title: Snowball and Egg Knockback
description: Mod for Fabric that adds snowball, egg and ender pearl knockback to players.
body:
# Summary

Mod for Fabric that adds snowball, egg, and ender pearl knockback and damage to players. This mod only needs to be installed server-side

# Commands

`/snowkb` `/eggkb` `/pearlkb` `/bobberpull`

with the arguments

`set <value>`, `add <value>`, `get`

The get commands return the value but times 1000 for scoreboard purposes.  (No longer done in version 1.2+, use the scale argument in the get command)

# Warning

Setting high values of knockback (10000+) can and will lag the server. Negative values are also allowed, causing an inconsistent pull effect.
